block-editor-tutorial.title: Guide editor tutorial
block-editor-tutorial.description: Learn how to use the guide editor to create and edit interactive guides.

e2e-framework-test.title: E2E framework test
e2e-framework-test.description: Test fixture for the E2E framework. Not intended for end users.

first-dashboard.title: Create your first dashboard
first-dashboard.description: Learn to create a dashboard in Grafana. Covering features such as Explore, dashboard creation, visualizations and more.

first-dashboard-cloud.title: Create your first dashboard in Grafana Cloud
first-dashboard-cloud.description: Learn to create a dashboard in Grafana Cloud. Covering features such as Explore, dashboard creation, visualizations and more.

json-guide-demo.title: JSON Guide Demo - All Block Types
json-guide-demo.description: Demonstrates all available block types in the JSON guide format.

loki-grafana-101.title: Loki & Grafana 101
loki-grafana-101.description: Continue from the Prometheus tutorial: configure Loki and add a logs panel to your existing dashboard.

prometheus-advanced-queries.title: Advanced Prometheus Queries
prometheus-advanced-queries.description: Master advanced PromQL patterns including aggregations, histograms, predictions, and SLO calculations. Queries can be customized with Assistant for your datasources.

prometheus-grafana-101.title: Prometheus & Grafana 101
prometheus-grafana-101.description: Learn to use Prometheus and Grafana to monitor your infrastructure. Perfect for getting started and understanding where everything is located.

welcome-to-grafana.title: Welcome to Grafana
welcome-to-grafana.description: Take a guided tour of Grafana's key areas. Perfect for getting started and understanding where everything is located.

welcome-to-grafana-cloud.title: Welcome to Grafana Cloud
welcome-to-grafana-cloud.description: Take a guided tour of Grafana Cloud's key areas. Perfect for getting started and understanding where everything is located.

get-started-hub.title: Get started with Grafana Cloud
get-started-hub.description: Choose how to get started with Grafana Cloud and reach a first success fast: explore demo data, connect existing data, send metrics, load test with k6, or monitor uptime.

get-started-explore.title: See Grafana Cloud in action with demo data
get-started-explore.description: Install ready-made demo dashboards and read your first one. The fastest way to see value with no data setup.

get-started-connect-data.title: Query data where it lives
get-started-connect-data.description: Connect a data source and query it in place, with no moving or duplicating your data.

get-started-monitor-host.title: Monitor a host or service
get-started-monitor-host.description: Install an integration that sets up data collection and a prebuilt dashboard for a host, database, or web server.

run-first-k6-test-lj.title: Run your first k6 performance test
run-first-k6-test-lj.description: Create and run your first performance test against a target.

detect-outages-synthetic-monitoring-lj.title: Detect customer-visible outages using Synthetic Monitoring
detect-outages-synthetic-monitoring-lj.description: Create your first check to track availability and latency.

prom-remote-write-lj.title: Send metrics to Grafana Cloud using Prometheus remote write
prom-remote-write-lj.description: Already running Prometheus? Push its metrics to Grafana Cloud with remote write.

run-first-k6-test-install-k6.title: Install k6
run-first-k6-test-install-k6.description: Hands-on guide: Install k6 on your machine and verify the installation.

run-first-k6-test-write-test-script.title: Write your first k6 test script
run-first-k6-test-write-test-script.description: Hands-on guide: Create a k6 test script with HTTP requests and checks.

run-first-k6-test-run-locally.title: Run your k6 test locally
run-first-k6-test-run-locally.description: Hands-on guide: Execute your k6 test and review results in your terminal.

run-first-k6-test-send-to-grafana-cloud.title: Send test results to Grafana Cloud
run-first-k6-test-send-to-grafana-cloud.description: Hands-on guide: Find your API token and stream k6 test results to Grafana Cloud.

run-first-k6-test-analyze-results.title: Analyze test results in Grafana Cloud
run-first-k6-test-analyze-results.description: Hands-on guide: Navigate test results and explore Performance Overview, Cloud Insights, HTTP, and Thresholds tabs.

run-first-k6-test-end-journey.title: Destination reached!
run-first-k6-test-end-journey.description: Congratulations on completing your first k6 performance test journey.

detect-outages-synthetic-monitoring-navi.title: Navigate to Synthetic Monitoring
detect-outages-synthetic-monitoring-navi.description: Learn how to access the Synthetic Monitoring app within Grafana Cloud to view and manage your checks.

detect-outages-synthetic-monitoring-init.title: Initialize the Synthetic Monitoring plugin
detect-outages-synthetic-monitoring-init.description: Learn how to initialize the Synthetic Monitoring plugin to set up the required data sources for your checks.

detect-outages-synthetic-monitoring-crea.title: Create a ping check
detect-outages-synthetic-monitoring-crea.description: Learn how to create your first ping check to test endpoint reachability and measure response latency.

detect-outages-synthetic-monitoring-sele.title: Select probe locations
detect-outages-synthetic-monitoring-sele.description: Learn how to select global probe locations and create your check to start monitoring your services.

detect-outages-synthetic-monitoring-view.title: View the check dashboard
detect-outages-synthetic-monitoring-view.description: Learn how to view and interpret the check dashboard with uptime, latency, and reachability metrics.

detect-outages-synthetic-monitoring-end-.title: Destination reached!
detect-outages-synthetic-monitoring-end-.description: Congratulations on completing the Synthetic Monitoring get started learning path! Explore next steps for expanding your monitoring capabilities.

prom-remote-write-verify-prom-data.title: Verify Prometheus metrics are written to an endpoint
prom-remote-write-verify-prom-data.description: How to verify that metrics are being written to an endpoint.

prom-remote-write-configure.title: Configure Prometheus remote write to send metrics to Grafana Cloud
prom-remote-write-configure.description: How to configure Prometheus to send metrics to Grafana Cloud.

prom-remote-write-verify-metrics.title: Verify metrics query successful
prom-remote-write-verify-metrics.description: How to verify that a Prometheus data source query works.

prom-remote-write-end.title: Destination reached!
prom-remote-write-end.description: Your journey concludes and it's time to learn about related paths you can take.
